title: Help with formula

posts.author: skeedoo2 (Jessica)
posts.cookedHtml:
The formula below is returning an error when there is no Landing Page URL provided. I want it to just return nothing (““). I am puling my hair out. Can someone tell me what I am doing wrong?

IF(

{Landing Page URL} = “”,

“”,

IF(

FIND("#", {Landing Page URL}) > 0,

LEFT({Landing Page URL}, FIND("#", {Landing Page URL}) - 1),

{Landing Page URL}

)

)

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Is the column ‘Landing Page URL’ a ‘link’ column ?

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @skeedoo2 ,

Try:

IF({Landing Page URL}="",
    "", 
    IF(FIND("#",
         IF({Landing Page URL}="","#",{Landing Page URL}))>0,
             LEFT({Landing Page URL},FIND("#",IF({Landing Page URL}="","#",{Landing Page URL}))-1),
             {Landing Page URL}
     )
)

2025-10-22_19-12-25450×117 11.7 KB

Hope it helps,

—

posts.author: skeedoo2 (Jessica)
posts.cookedHtml:
It is a link column type.

Jessica Tatge // Marketing Production Manager
